description: §18.0 — a value-form `match` whose every arm returns a VALUE (a string expression, incl. a computed `"Failed: " + reason`-style concatenation) SHALL NOT fire E-MATCH-ARM-MARKUP-IN-VALUE. Acceptance sibling of e-match-arm-markup-in-value-pos: proves the markup-opener detector (`^<tagname`) does NOT over-fire on ordinary value arms.
rationale: §18.0: a value-form `match` arm returns a VALUE; when every arm body is a value expression the arm-body-is-markup steer is correctly silent.
